reviews.review_description: When it shut down because the owner decided to make v3
The only thing that makes me feel sad is people who are racist

reviews.review_title: Game is good but getting bad now
reviews.review_description: Too many remakes game not even fun anymore and maps to big and see people kinda PLEASE MAKE IT BETTER
You need to get more better moderators one time One time, moderators won't stop kicking me. Until we put it in a name. I'm gonna give it 4 Stars because it's my cousin's game.
It has a cool style but it keeps crashing on me
It keeps kicking me out of the game

developer_response.body: not anymore, that was just a event

reviews.review_description: What I said was on September 16 2023, and itвҖҷs October 1st рҹ’Җ that was long ago when I said that

reviews.review_title: I got banned for no reason.
reviews.review_description:
I downloaded the game and got in a lobby.

Some moderator banned me for having no name.

Worst game ever.

I didn't even know the rules until I checked after I was banned.

The rules didn't even say don't have no name.

I recommend not downloading this game.

developer_response.body: Mods cant ban, only the creators.

reviews.review_description: Hey may I be a mod I want to make content on your game pls
IвҖҷm a moderator in the game so Yall know and in my opinion i would rate 10/10 ;)

reviews.review_title: Best gorilla tag fan game out there
Mod in the game very cool game
